```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if not s:
        return ""
    # Create concatenated string for KMP
    concat = s + '#' + s[::-1]
    # Compute failure array
    fail = [0] * len(concat)
    for i in range(1, len(concat)):
        j = fail[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and concat[i] != concat[j]:
            j = fail[j - 1]
        if concat[i] == concat[j]:
            j += 1
        fail[i] = j
    # Length of the longest prefix which is also a suffix
    lps = fail[-1]
    # Characters to prepend
    to_add = s[:len(s) - lps][::-1]
    return to_add + s

# Read input from standard input
import sys
s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(s))
```
